gate-check.description: Report ship-protocol gate status (read-only; authority: docs/GATE_MODE_SOP.md).
gate-check.template: Read docs/GATE_MODE_SOP.md. Report read-only: current branch, uncommitted changes, and which ship protocols apply -- COMMIT (codex mutual-agreement GREEN), PUSH (full gate suite on the final tip: lint, unit npm run test:ci, monitored build npm run build:monitored:clean, e2e), MERGE (push confirmed + GitHub CI green; the owner merges). Do not run any gate; just report state and what remains. $ARGUMENTS

update-docs.description: End-of-session documentation update per the repo's update-docs skill.
update-docs.template: Read .claude/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md and follow its manifest-aware end-of-session documentation procedure: capture lessons to docs/LESSONS.md, update docs/_meta/docs-manifest.json facts, and validate with npm run docs:gate. Archive-before-edit for any handoff/plan doc. $ARGUMENTS
